description: Food is prepared and cooked in 'nuroa', a place arranged for that work. The place may be a room, a shared work area, or an outdoor site instead of a modern fitted interior. Household 'moeli' (hearth) identifies one particular centre of heat; a kitchen is defined by the wider preparation work.
articulatory_notes: Place the tongue tip at the upper teeth for voiced dental nasal 'n' and round the lips for high-back 'u'. Tap 'r' at the alveolar ridge into stressed rounded mid-back 'o', then keep the final open 'a' separate across the hiatus.
usage_notes: Ownership, work arrangements, fuel, and equipment are separate parts of the account. A kitchen can be private, communal, temporary, or shared between several households.

semantic_domains.activity: a place organised around preparing and cooking food
semantic_domains.community: a domestic or shared place where food work may be coordinated
semantic_domains.spatial: a room or area identified by food preparation
